# Fourfold.ai

> Fourfold is an AI-managed consultancy that builds enterprise-grade software products in two weeks for $5K. We combine senior engineers who've mastered AI-assisted development with Pact, an agentic software factory that coordinates AI agents, senior engineers, and your organization's context into a single delivery pipeline. Our clients are aspiring entrepreneurs, small businesses, and teams without engineering bandwidth who need a technical partner to move from idea to working product.

## Core offering

- Outcome-based pricing: $5K flat fee, two-week delivery, working product at the end
- Senior engineers who have mastered AI-assisted development (Claude Code, LLM orchestration, prompt engineering)
- Pact: an agentic software factory that coordinates AI agents, senior engineers, and organizational knowledge into a single delivery pipeline
- Senior human review on every line of AI-generated code for quality, security, and scalability
- Full code ownership — your product, your codebase, your IP, no lock-in
- Institutional memory: Pact learns your organization (approval chains, security requirements, compliance needs, team preferences) so every engagement is faster than the last

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://fourfold.ai/
- How We Work: https://fourfold.ai/how-we-work
- Pact (the platform): https://fourfold.ai/pact
- Build page (for makers outgrowing no-code): https://fourfold.ai/build
- Blog: https://fourfold.ai/blog
- Outcome-Driven Management (ODM): https://fourfold.ai/blog/outcome-driven-management
- Case Study — Planorize: https://fourfold.ai/blog/planorize
- Contact form: https://fourfold.ai/#contact

## Pact — The Agentic Software Factory

Pact is the platform behind Fourfold. It has three layers:
1. **AI Agents** — Purpose-built agents that spec features, write code, run tests, conduct reviews, generate documentation, and manage deployments.
2. **Coordination Engine** — Routes work through quality gates, manages approval workflows, sequences dependencies, and surfaces risks before they become blockers.
3. **Institutional Memory** — Every engagement builds a model of your organization. That model persists and improves. Your second engagement is faster than your first.

## Outcome-Driven Management (ODM)

ODM is Fourfold's management framework that makes outcomes, not tasks, the atomic unit of work. It is designed to be continuous, fast, and cost-effective by aligning with how people work in modern organizations. ODM is implemented using existing systems of record and powered by Pact AI agents. Learn more at https://withpact.com/

## Results

- Planorize: Built a production booking platform in 2 weeks that another vendor quoted at 4 months. Saves 3–5 hours per organizer per week. — Whitney Elliott, Owner, Planorize
- Client went from kickoff to working demo in 4 days; onboarding customers by week 2

## Who Fourfold is for

- Teams without engineering bandwidth who can't get on the engineering roadmap
- Founders and solopreneurs who want to ship a real product, not a slide deck
- Companies that need an ongoing ability to turn ideas into working software
- Makers who outgrew their no-code tool (Bubble, Cursor, Lovable, Bolt)

## Contact

To start a project or learn more, visit https://fourfold.ai/#contact
